properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 66/26



NORWEGIAN SEA



1.ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 18 MAY 26 TO 24 MAY 26 DAILY FROM 2000 TO 0300 UTC.

   MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA.



DANGER AREA SEA GOLF 1 MAY 26

A. 69-08.00N 015-40.00E

B. 69-14.00N 015-23.00E

C. 69-09.00N 015-10.00E

D. 69-06.00N 015-36.00E



DANGER AREA SEA GOLF 2 MAY 26

A. 69-48.00N 007-45.00E

B. 69-23.00N 010-48.00E

C. 70-42.00N 012-35.00E

D. 71-09.00N 009-50.00E



2. FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 45 87 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN “ANDOEYA SPACE”). E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO. FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 09/2026 WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS
